en: But this song's awesome
Mascara's still holding on
Playin' to another song
All I do since you've been gone
ko: 네가 떠난 이후로 내가 하는 건

en: Is stay up and stay out
Beggin' for the bass till it's hittin' me right
ko: 베이스가 나를 제대로 때릴 때까지 애원해

en: Sweatin' on the dance floor under the lights
ko: 조명 아래 댄스 플로어에서 땀을 흘리며

en: To get over you
I'll be here all night
Playin' my heart so I don't start to cry
ko: 눈물이 나지 않게 내 마음을 연주해

en: DJ's workin' late, she's helpin' me try
ko: DJ가 늦게까지 일하고 있어, 나를 도와주고 있어

en: To get over you
I'll be here all night
I don't wanna go all natural I want electronic
Cause if the music ever stops
I might go psychotic
But if I'm never better And never be back together
ko: 하지만 내가 절대 나아지지 않고 다시 함께하지 않으면

en: I'll turn the pain to pleasure
I could stay here forever
Mascara's still holding on
Playin' to another song
All I do since you've been gone
ko: 네가 떠난 이후로 내가 하는 건
